---
title: "Concatenated ML tree"
author: "Ryan Andrews"
format: html
editor: visual
---

#load in vcf file
```{r}
#load packages
library(vcfR)

# load in vcf
vcfR<- read.vcfR("~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/vcfs/filtered.miat.unlinked.snps.vcf.gz")
```

#generate white list with loci
```{r}
head(vcfR@fix)
head(vcfR@fix[,1])
#get a list of just locus names to use as whitelist for stacks
whitelist <- unique(sub(":.*", "", vcfR@fix[, "ID"]))

#make sure each locus is unique
length(unique(whitelist)) == length(whitelist)

#write out white list
#write.table(whitelist, file = "~/Desktop/Projects/Dicaeum/iqtree/dicaeum.unlinked.whitelist.txt", quote = F, row.names = F, col.names = F)
```
